# truewatch_alert_policy (Data Source)

The `truewatch_alert_policy` data source reads an existing TrueWatch alert policy by `uuid` or exact `name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The exact name of the alert policy.
- `notify_object_uuids` (List of String) Filter alert policies by notification object UUIDs when looking up by name.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the alert policy.

### Read-Only

- `alert_opt` (Attributes) Alert settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt))
- `checker_uuids` (List of String) Monitor/smart monitor/smart inspection/slo UUIDs.
- `create_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource created at.
- `desc` (String) The description of the alert policy.
- `open_permission_set` (Boolean) Whether custom permission configuration is enabled.
- `permission_set` (List of String) Operation permission configuration.
- `rule_timezone` (String) The timezone of the alert policy.
- `security_rule_uuids` (List of String) Security monitoring UUIDs.
- `update_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource updated at.
- `workspace_uuid` (String) The UUID of the workspace.

<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt`

Read-Only:

- `agg_cluster_fields` (List of String) Field list for smart aggregation.
- `agg_fields` (List of String) Aggregation field list.
- `agg_interval` (Number) Alert aggregation interval, in seconds.
- `agg_labels` (List of String) Label value list when aggregating by label.
- `agg_send_first` (Boolean) Whether the first alert is sent directly when aggregating.
- `agg_type` (String) Alert aggregation type.
- `alert_target` (Attributes List) Trigger action configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target))
- `alert_type` (String) Alert policy notification type, level(status)/member(member).
- `ignore_ok` (Boolean) Advanced configuration, normal level only generates events, does not send notifications.
- `silent_timeout` (Number) Minimum alert interval in seconds.
- `silent_timeout_by_status` (Attributes List) Level-specific minimum alert interval configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt--silent_timeout_by_status))
- `silent_timeout_by_status_enable` (Boolean) Whether level-specific repeated alert configuration is enabled.

<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt.alert_target`

Read-Only:

- `alert_info` (Attributes List) Member-type alert notification configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--alert_info))
- `crontab` (String) Repeated time period start crontab.
- `crontab_duration` (Number) Repeated time duration in seconds.
- `custom_date_uuids` (List of String) Custom notification date UUID list.
- `custom_duration` (Number) Custom time duration in seconds.
- `custom_start_time` (String) Daily custom start time.
- `name` (String) Configuration name.
- `targets` (Attributes List) Notification target configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--targets))

<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--alert_info"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt.alert_target.alert_info`

Read-Only:

- `filter_string` (String) Filter condition original string.
- `member_info` (List of String) Team or member UUID list.
- `name` (String) Configuration name.
- `targets` (Attributes List) Notification target configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--alert_info--targets))

<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--alert_info--targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt.alert_target.alert_info.targets`

Read-Only:

- `df_source` (String) Data source, such as security for security monitoring statuses.
- `filter_string` (String) Filter condition original string.
- `status` (String) Alert status values.
- `tags` (Map of List of String) Filter conditions.
- `to` (List of String) Notification objects/members/teams.
- `upgrade_targets` (Attributes List) Upgrade notification target configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--alert_info--targets--upgrade_targets))

<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--alert_info--targets--upgrade_targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt.alert_target.alert_info.targets.upgrade_targets`

Read-Only:

- `duration` (Number) Upgrade duration in seconds.
- `to` (List of String) Notification objects/members/teams.
- `to_way` (List of String) Notification ways.




<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt.alert_target.targets`

Read-Only:

- `df_source` (String) Data source, such as security for security monitoring statuses.
- `filter_string` (String) Filter condition original string.
- `status` (String) Alert status values.
- `tags` (Map of List of String) Filter conditions.
- `to` (List of String) Notification objects/members/teams.
- `upgrade_targets` (Attributes List) Upgrade notification target configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--targets--upgrade_targets))

<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt--alert_target--targets--upgrade_targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt.alert_target.targets.upgrade_targets`

Read-Only:

- `duration` (Number) Upgrade duration in seconds.
- `to` (List of String) Notification objects/members/teams.
- `to_way` (List of String) Notification ways.




<a id="nestedatt--alert_opt--silent_timeout_by_status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_opt.silent_timeout_by_status`

Read-Only:

- `silent_timeout` (Number) Minimum alert interval, in seconds.
- `status` (String) Status value.
